name: dex-labs
description: DEX Labs - a personal local-network site with pluggable subsystems: Lesson Tracker (YouTube lessons + tute files by subject/grade), AirDrop (LAN file share), Daily Schedule, Clock (Timer/Alarm/Stopwatch), a YouTube Downloader, and Study (subjects, Stopwatch/Pomodoro focus sessions, stats, and a year heatmap). Runs as a Windows system tray application.
